name: Cheddar Poppy Strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the biscuit mix in a large bowl with the basil. Stir in the milk with a fork until the dough is soft.
2. Knead the dough a few times on a floured board.
3. Roll out the dough into a rectangle that measures 16 inches by 10 inches. Brush one side with 1 tablespoon of melted butter and sprinkle evenly with shredded Cheddar cheese.
4. Fold the dough in thirds lengthwise, creating a strip that is 16 inches long and 3 inches wide.
5. Brush the remaining melted butter over the dough and sprinkle with poppy seeds.
6. Cut the strip crosswise into 16 one-inch pieces.
7. Place the strips on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes, or until the strips are golden brown. Serve warm.
